channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ACB discovers benamidars linked to Eknath Shinde during raids
item.description: The article highlights the discovery of illegal properties (benamidars) belonging to Maharashtra's Chief Minister Eknath Shinde by the Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) during recent raids. This developmen...

item.description: The article details political developments involving Australian political figures and international events. Pauline Hanson, leader of the One Nation party, has ruled out recruiting Victorian Liberal M...

item.title: Claire Castro condemns alleged harassment during Philippine community protest in Vancouver
item.description: Palace Press Officer Undersecretary Claire Castro spoke out about an alleged harassment incident she experienced in Vancouver, Canada, during President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr.’s official visit...

item.title: CAF Launches Bidding Process for Future AFCON Tournaments
item.description: The Confederation of African Football (CAF) has officially launched the bidding process for the 2028, 2032, and 2036 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) tournaments, inviting all 54 member associations to c...

item.title: Ukrainian drones target Russian oil infrastructure in escalating conflict
item.description: Ukrainian long-range drones have struck a major oil terminal in St. Petersburg, marking another escalation in the ongoing conflict with Russia. The attack, which occurred on July 4, 2026, targeted a c...

item.title: Iran Holds Funeral Rites for Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Iran is set to hold funeral rites for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the country's supreme leader who was killed in an airstrike during the U.S.-Israeli war in February. After four months of uncertainty due ...

item.title: Pastor's Brother Emphasizes Importance of Parental Blessings in Spiritual Growth
item.description: A video featuring Apostle Jackson Mwangi, the youngest brother of Pastor Kanyari, has gone viral for highlighting the spiritual significance of seeking blessings from parents. In a TikTok post, Mwangi...

item.title: Trump's Speech on American Freedoms and Criticism of Progressive Democrats
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a speech at Mount Rushmore on the eve of Independence Day, commemorating the 250th anniversary of American independence. He praised the nation's founding principles...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts Global Marine Conservation Summit to Promote Sustainable Ocean Management
item.description: Tanzania is set to host the 12th Conference of the Parties (COP12) to the Nairobi Convention, a major international gathering focused on marine conservation and sustainable ocean management. The event...

item.description: Snow Patrol delivered an unforgettable performance at Crystal Palace Park, surprising fans by collaborating with pop icon Kylie Minogue during the live debut of their new single 'These Alarms'. The ev...

item.title: Trump Shares Memes About Politicians on Independence Day
item.description: President Donald Trump celebrated the 250th anniversary of the United States by sharing early morning social media posts comparing Democratic politicians to fictional characters. At 2:11 a.m., Trump p...

item.title: Springboks Struggle with Ticket Sales for England Test Match
item.description: The Springboks, South Africa's national rugby team, are grappling with slower-than-expected ticket sales for their opening Test match against England in the inaugural Nations Championship at Ellis Par...

item.title: India designates 23 Pakistan-based individuals as terrorists under UAPA
item.description: The Union government has designated 23 individuals allegedly linked to Pakistan-based terror groups like Jaish-e-Mohammed, Lashkar-e-Taiba, Jamaat-ud-Dawa, and The Resistance Front as terrorists under...

item.title: Lindi Drug Bust: 32kg Narcotics Seized in Major Trafficking Arrest
item.description: Authorities in Lindi region have arrested a lorry driver after discovering 32 kilograms of illicit drugs concealed in the vehicle, marking a significant anti-narcotics operation. The seizure highlight...

item.title: Senator Lacson Alleges Reverse Trial in Marcoleta's Plunder Case
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson has accused Senator Rodante Marcoleta of facing a potential 'reverse trial' in his plunder case, citing the senator's televised admission of receiving P75 million in campaign co...

item.title: WITIA Launches Second Smart Library to Boost Digital Learning in Kenya
item.description: Women in Technology and Innovation Africa (WITIA) has launched its second Smart Library in Machakos County, expanding its digital education initiative. The facility at Mbukoni Comprehensive School is ...

item.title: Ireland and Australia Renew Rivalry in Nations Championship Match
item.description: The article details the intense rugby match between Ireland and Australia during the inaugural Nations Championship, highlighting their historical rivalry. Ireland seeks a strong start to their campai...

item.title: LIGO Detects Possible Primordial Black Hole Linked to Dark Matter
item.description: A recent LIGO signal has sparked scientific intrigue, potentially pointing to a primordial black hole that could explain dark matter's elusive nature. Researchers suggest the signal might originate fr...

item.title: Europe dominates global passport rankings with top 9 positions in 2026 index
item.description: The Global Passport Index (GPI) for 2026 reveals that nine out of the ten most powerful passports are European, led by Sweden. Singapore is the only non-European country in the top ten. Unlike the Hen...
